name: hex
description: Hex workflows for searching projects and asking Hex Threads questions about workspace data.

interface.shortDescription: Search Hex projects and ask Hex Threads questions
interface.longDescription: Hex helps users find existing Hex projects, dashboards, and data apps, then ask Hex Threads questions when the user explicitly wants to work in Hex.
interface.defaultPrompt: Search Hex projects or ask a Hex Thread question when the user explicitly wants Hex.
